data.title: IDEAYA Eye Cancer Trial Data Beats Standard Therapy, Stock Soars
data.description: IDEAYA Biosciences Inc. (NASDAQ: IDYA) saw an increase in shares during Monday's premarket trading following the release of positive topline results from the Phase 2/3 trial for darovasertib in combination with crizotinib. The trial aimed at providing a new treatment option for patients with metastatic uveal melanoma, a form of eye cancer. IDEAYA, a precision medicine oncology company, indicated a statistically significant enhancement in median progression-free survival (PFS) with the darovasertib combination compared to the investigator's choice of therapy, with the trial successfully meeting its primary endpoint. Results showed a notable improvement in median PFS, with 6.9 months for the darovasertib combination against 3.1 months for ICT. Patients on the darovasertib combo experienced a 58% reduction in the risk of disease progression. Secondary endpoints reflected higher response rates in the study.

data.title: 3 E Network Vice President Introduces First Strategic Blueprint for Semiconductor and Compute Infrastructure Development
data.description: A new AI infrastructure blueprint was revealed by the 3 E Network. This blueprint includes a vertically integrated semiconductor ecosystem and a heterogeneous computing matrix.

data.title: ParaZero Secures a Follow-on Order for DefendAir Counter-UAS, Including Personal Net Launchers, Net Pods, and Training
data.description: On April 13, 2026, in Kfar Saba, Israel, ParaZero Technologies Ltd. (Nasdaq: PRZO) shared news of a recent development. The aerospace defense company, known for its innovative autonomous solutions in both manned and unmanned aerial systems (UAS) industry, confirmed a fresh purchase order from a defense entity. This order specifically pertains to their sophisticated DefendAir Counter-Unmanned Aerial Systems (CUAS) solution, showcasing continued growth and interest in their products.

data.title: How To Earn $500 A Month From Wells Fargo Stock Ahead Of Q1 Earnings
data.description: Wells Fargo & Company is set to announce its first-quarter earnings on Tuesday, April 14. Analysts are projecting earnings of $1.58 per share, an increase from $1.39 per share a year ago. Revenue for the quarter is estimated to be around $21.77 billion, compared to $20.15 billion in the previous year. The bank currently offers an annual dividend yield of 2.11%, with a quarterly dividend payout of 45 cents per share ($1.80 annually). Investors are considering potential gains from the company's dividends. To earn a steady $500 per month from Wells Fargo's dividend yield, a strategy needs to be implemented.

data.title: New Oracle Aconex Capabilities Improve Project Transparency and Control
data.description: In Austin, Texas on April 13, 2026, Oracle disclosed at the Oracle Edge Customer Summit an update on Oracle Aconex that includes improved document procedures and test plans for organized ITP workflows. These enhancements are aimed at aiding teams in minimizing risk, ensuring a thorough audit trail, and ultimately expediting project accomplishments.

data.title: Auxly Provides Update on Stalking Horse Bid for Ayurcann
data.description: On April 13, 2026, Auxly Cannabis Group Inc. (TSX: XLY) (OTCQB: CBWTF), a prominent player in the cannabis products market, unveiled their stalking horse bid for Ayurcann Holdings Corp's assets. This move solidifies Auxly's position as a key player in the industry.

data.title: BV Investment Partners Honored for Second Year In a Row By HEC-Paris Dow Jones
data.description: BV Investment Partners, a middle-market private equity firm specializing in tech-enabled business services and solutions, was recently ranked among the top 10 performers in the Lower Mid-Market Buyout category for the year 2025. This recognition highlights BV's strong performance and strategic investments in the sector. The firm's achievements were acknowledged in Boston on April 13, 2026. BV's success in this area underscores its position as a key player in the industry, showcasing its value creation and competitive edge.

data.title: NervGen Pharma to Participate in the H.C. Wainwright "HCW@Home" Series and the 2026 Bloom Burton & Co. Healthcare Investor Conference
data.description: NervGen Pharma Corp., a biopharmaceutical company based in Vancouver, announced that its President and CEO, Adam Rogers, MD, along with other executives, will be taking part in upcoming events. These include the H.C. Wainwright “HCW@Home” series and the 2026 Bloom Burton & Co. Healthcare Investor Conference. NervGen is focused on developing innovative neuroreparative therapeutics for spinal cord injuries and other neurotraumatic conditions. The company is listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol NGEN.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures Fall, Oil Prices Spike With U.S. Set To Blockade Iran's Ports; Goldman Sachs Beats Views
data.description: Stock futures are on the decline and oil prices have surged following news that the U.S. Navy plans to blockade Iranian ports starting at 10 a.m. Eastern Time on Monday, after unsuccessful talks with Iran. Before the market opened, Goldman Sachs reported better-than-expected results. The Dow Jones futures dipped amidst these developments.

data.title: Ballard welcomes Ralph Robinett as Chief Operating Officer
data.description: In Vancouver, BC on April 13, 2026, Ballard Power Systems announced the appointment of Ralph Robinett as the new Senior Vice President and Chief Operating Officer. Robinett will be taking over from Lee Sweetland, starting on the same date. With over 25 years of experience in global operations, Robinett is expected to bring valuable expertise to the company. Ballard Power Systems is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol BLDP and on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the same symbol.
